lever_summary: Dense rank-2 F64 max/min reduce_window (maxpool/minpool). This case went fully generic — per-window-element tensor.elements[idx] Literal materialization + reduce_window_accumulate_literal enum dispatch. New eval_reduce_window_rank2_f64_max_min reads the operand from as_f64_slice() and accumulates in f64 via jax_max_f64/jax_min_f64, emitting a dense f64 output.

alien_graveyard.primitive: dense SoA + stencil/windowed reduction over contiguous typed storage
alien_graveyard.mapping: evaluate the pooling stencil over contiguous native f64 with a typed combiner instead of materializing + dispatching a tagged-union per window element

method: Same-worker comparison on ts2: dense (new_f64_values) operand vs a Vec<Literal>-backed operand (forces the generic path) run in the same process; identical 3x3 SAME maxpool params.
command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- maxpool_256x256_f64 --save-baseline mp

change.lever: Added eval_reduce_window_rank2_f64_max_min (reads as_f64_slice, jax_max_f64/jax_min_f64 accumulate, new_f64_values output). eval_reduce_window routes rank-2 F64 max/min with dense storage to it before the generic path; non-dense / other ranks / other dtypes fall through unchanged.

isomorphism.ordering: unchanged: same out-position iteration and in-window iteration with the same padding skip (padded_pos < pad_low or input_pos >= dim -> skipped)
isomorphism.combiner: unchanged: initial accumulator -inf (max) / +inf (min); per in-bounds element jax_max_f64 / jax_min_f64 (NaN-propagating) — identical to the generic ReduceWindowAccumulator::F64 path; output via from_f64 (reduce_window_output_dtype(F64) == F64)
isomorphism.padding: SAME and VALID both validated; geometry (out_dims, pad_lows) computed by the shared caller code, identical to the generic path
isomorphism.errors: same checked_mul/checked_add window/flat index overflow checks; gated on as_f64_slice() Some so only well-formed dense F64 reaches it; non-dense F64 falls through to the generic path

validation.name: dense_maxpool_parity
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib --release reduce_window
validation.result: passed: 28 tests incl dense_f64_reduce_window_max_min_matches_generic (max/min x 3x3 SAME, 2x2 VALID, 3x2 VALID; NaN/+-inf/-0; dense vs Literal/generic by bits)

validation.name: clippy_deny_warnings
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --release --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
validation.result: passed (release dodges shared-target proc-macro rmeta drift in debug)
